_comment: Career application tracker (valid JSON). Edit values directly.
_how_to_use: Add one object per job in applications[].
Keep status to: applied | screening | interview | assessment | offer | rejected | withdrawn.
Use notes for follow-up reminders, recruiter responses, and interview prep bullets.

_fields_guide.resume_version: Resume variant used for this role
_fields_guide.notes: Anything useful: talking points, interview dates, response history

application_advice._comment: Use this checklist for each position you apply to.
before_applying: Match your resume to 6-8 exact keywords from the job description.
Write 2-3 bullets that prove fit with numbers/results.
Find recruiter or team lead on LinkedIn and save profile link.
during_application: Use a custom resume version per role type.
Add a short, role-specific cover note (3-5 lines).
Save job URL and job ID in notes.
after_applying: Send one follow-up in 7-10 days if no response.
Prepare 5 talking points tailored to the company product/team.
Track every response and next step date in this file.
